articles.title: BSE Market Cap Reclaims USD 5 Trillion Mark, Investors Gain ₹22.78 Lakh Crore In Four-Day Rally
articles.description: Indian stock markets extended their winning streak for a fourth session, helping the market value of BSE-listed companies cross USD 5 trillion again. Falling crude oil prices and easing geopolitical tensions boosted investor confidence, adding ₹22.78 lakh crore to overall investor wealth in just four days.
